signature.heightOutOfRange: Signature height must be between 25px and page height

convert.noPdfSelected: Please select a PDF file first

watermark.systemFontNotInstalled: Failed to read system font, please ensure SimSun font is installed

watermark.gapTooSmall: Watermark spacing too small, tile count exceeds limit

watermark.selectImageFormat: Please select a PNG or JPG image file

annotation.pageOutOfBounds: Annotation page number out of bounds

page.cannotDeleteAll: Cannot delete all pages of the document

app.title: PDF Toolbox

dropzone.dragOrClick: Drag & drop or click to add PDF files
dropzone.ariaLabel: Drag & drop or click to add PDF files

fileList.emptyHint: Drag PDF files above or click to add

app.totalSizeExceeded: Adding {{name}} would exceed total size limit ({{limit}}MB), skipping
app.invalidPdfFile: {{name}} is not a valid PDF document
app.fileLoadFailed: Failed to load file {{name}}, please check if it is a valid PDF file
app.memoryWarning: Currently loaded {{size}}MB of file data, may affect performance. Consider reducing file count or size.
app.fileLocked: This file is being processed by another operation, please try again later

merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one. Drag to reorder files.
merge.selectFiles: Please add at least 2 PDF files first

split.title: Split PDF
split.description: Split PDF by page ranges into multiple files.
split.label: Page Range
split.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to split first

compress.title: Compress PDF
compress.description: Reduce PDF file size for better storage
compress.speedPriorityDesc: Fast save speed, UI may briefly lag during save
compress.balancedDesc: Balanced save speed and UI responsiveness
compress.stabilityPriorityDesc: Good UI response during save, longer save time
compress.selectFiles: Please select PDF files to compress

encrypt.title: Encrypt / Decrypt PDF
encrypt.description: Add password protection or remove password from PDF
encrypt.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to encrypt/decrypt
encrypt.decryptHint: Enter the PDF user or owner password to remove encryption

watermark.title: Add Watermark
watermark.description: Add text or image watermark to PDF
watermark.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to add watermark

pageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers
pageNumbers.description: Add page numbers to each page of a PDF
pageNumbers.selectFiles: Please select PDF files to add page numbers

edit.title: Edit PDF
edit.description: Add text, rectangles, circles, highlights and other annotations to PDF

signature.title: PDF Signature
signature.description: Add handwritten or image signature to PDF
signature.selectFile: Please select a PDF file first
signature.selectFileHint: Please add a PDF file first
signature.canvasHint: Draw your signature in this area
signature.dragToPosition: Click or drag to adjust signature position
signature.dragHint: Drag signature to adjust position, use slider to resize

convert.title: PDF to Images
convert.description: Convert PDF pages to PNG or JPG images
convert.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to convert

imagesToPdf.title: Images to PDF
imagesToPdf.description: Combine multiple images into a single PDF file
imagesToPdf.pageSizeAutoHint: Each page matches image size, no scaling
imagesToPdf.pageSizeA4Hint: Images will be scaled to fit A4 pages

convertOffice.title: Office Conversion
convertOffice.description: Convert between PDF and Word documents
convertOffice.pdfToWordHint: PDF→Word: Extract text content to generate Word document (plain text format)
convertOffice.wordToPdfHint: Word→PDF: Convert to PDF while preserving original layout (requires mammoth library)
convertOffice.complexLayoutHint: Documents with complex layouts may need manual adjustment after conversion

ocr.title: OCR Recognition
ocr.description: Extract text from scanned PDFs, supports 100+ languages
ocr.selectFile: Please select a PDF file first
ocr.downloadModelHint: First use requires downloading language models (~25MB), or run npm run download-ocr-langs to pre-download
ocr.languageHint: Select matching language for best results
ocr.offlineModeHint: Local language data detected, will use offline mode
ocr.onlineModeHint: No local language data detected, will download from CDN (requires internet)

pageOps.title: Page Operations
pageOps.description: Rotate, delete, or extract specific pages from PDF.
pageOps.selectFile: Please select a PDF file first

errorBoundary.title: An Error Occurred
errorBoundary.description: The application encountered an unexpected error. You can try refreshing the page or copy the error details.

FILE_DATA_MISSING: File data is missing, please re-add the file
INVALID_PDF_HEADER: Unable to read file data, please re-add the file
NEED_AT_LEAST_ONE_PASSWORD: Please set at least a user password or owner password
SIGNATURE_OUT_OF_PAGE: Signature exceeds page bounds, please adjust position or reduce size
PDF_HAS_JAVASCRIPT: This PDF contains embedded JavaScript code which may pose security risks. Please check with a professional PDF tool before signing
INVALID_SIGNATURE_PATH: Invalid file path, please select a valid save location
INVALID_SIGNATURE_IMAGE: Signature image format error, please re-select or redraw
UNSUPPORTED_SIGNATURE_IMAGE: Unsupported signature image format, please use PNG or JPG
PAGE_INDEX_OUT_OF_RANGE: Page number out of range, please select a valid page
WORD_PARSE_FAILED: Word document parsing failed, please check the file format
UNSUPPORTED_IMAGE_FORMAT: Unsupported image format, please use PNG or JPG
SYSTEM_FONT_NOT_INSTALLED: Failed to read system font, please ensure SimSun font is installed
WATERMARK_TILE_LIMIT: Watermark tile limit reached (500 per page), bottom-right area may not be covered. Please increase spacing or reduce watermark size.
WATERMARK_GAP_TOO_SMALL: Watermark spacing too small, tile count exceeds limit
ANNOTATION_PAGE_OUT_OF_BOUNDS: Annotation page number out of bounds (annotation #{{index}} points to page {{page}}, document has {{total}} pages)
CANNOT_DELETE_ALL_PAGES: Cannot delete all pages of the document
SIGNATURE_FORMAT_PNG_JPG: Only PNG/JPG signature images are supported
SIGNATURE_INVALID_IMAGE: File is not a valid PNG/JPG image, please re-select
SIGNATURE_DECODE_FAILED: Image decode failed, please select a valid image file
SIGNATURE_WIDTH_OUT_OF_RANGE: Signature width must be between 50px and page width
SIGNATURE_HEIGHT_OUT_OF_RANGE: Signature height must be between 25px and page height
PAGE_SIZE_FETCH_FAILED: Failed to get page size, please check if the PDF is valid
NO_PDF_SELECTED: Please select a PDF file first
